_meta.dataset: VERIFY-AND-EXTEND of the commodity-coefficient table (ТР-1 Табл.4, K3) for the cargoes in reference-quotes-batch-0609.json, plus the class-3 K1 split (Табл.2) and the ×1.04 class-2/3 surcharges (п.3.3 / п.5.7). Findings + corrections ONLY — this file does NOT replace any live seed.
_meta.law: Приказ ФАС России от 06.11.2025 N 894/25 (ТР-1 2026), рег. Минюст 22.12.2025 N 84708, в силе с 2026-01-01
primarySources: https://sudact.ru/law/prikaz-fas-rossii-ot-06112025-n-89425/prilozhenie-n-1/prilozhenie-n-1_1/tablitsa-n-2/ (Табл.2 K1 class coefficient incl. class-3 1.74/1.54 split)
_meta.verifiedBy: subagent VerifyAndExtend pass, 2026-06-09: Табл.4 fetched 2 independent passes; Табл.2 fetched 1 pass; web cross-search attempted
_meta.antiFabricationPolicy: Every cell below either (a) reproduces a value already in a live seed and is marked CONFIRMED against the fetched primary source, or (b) is a correction copied from a fetched sudact pass. No number is interpolated, guessed, or reconstructed. Cells the fetch could not return cleanly verbatim are marked confidence:yellow/red with the exact source location.
_meta.extractionCaveat: The sudact page is fetched through a small summarizer model. The numeric-COLUMN alignment of Табл.4 was inconsistent between passes for some class-3 rows (a coefficient present in pass 1 read as blank in pass 2). Values that were STABLE across both passes are graded green; values that flipped are graded yellow. CODE membership (which ЕТСНГ codes are present/absent) was stable across passes and is trusted.
_meta.liveSeedCrossRef: scripts/seed-data/tr1-k3-full.json (commodity K3), tr1-class-coeff.json + tr1-class-coeff-corrected.json (K1 class split), tr1-class-k3-full-verify.json (prior verify pass)

commodityCoef_Table4.scope: Verify K3 товарный коэф for each cargo appearing in the reference batch.

254040_jb_stenovye.verbatim: «Материалы стеновые; Конструкции (сборные), детали и изделия железобетонные | 251, 254 | 0,91» (Раздел II, класс 2)
254040_jb_stenovye.matchesLiveSeed: tr1-k3-full.json class2 carries TWO separate rows: {251 'Материалы стеновые' 0.91} and {254 'Конструкции железобетонные' 0.91}. Source presents them as ONE combined row '251, 254 → 0,91'. Numerically identical; the seed split into two rows is harmless. NOTE for engine: 254040 is class 2, so K1=1.00 (not the 1.54/1.74 class-3 split) — matches reference C2-a/C2-b chains.

631184_legkaya_prom.cargoName: Материалы нетканые (reference label 'продукция лёгкой промышленности'); source row = «Ткани, изделия швейной и трикотажной промышленности»
631184_legkaya_prom.verbatim: «Ткани, изделия швейной и трикотажной промышленности | 631 - 634 | 0,75» (Раздел III, класс 3) — pass 1 returned 0,75; pass 2 read the coefficient column as blank for this row.
631184_legkaya_prom.labelCorrection: The reference _meta label 'легкая_пром_631184: 0.75' is the operator's PARAPHRASE. The literal Табл.4 row text is «Ткани, изделия швейной и трикотажной промышленности» (codes 631-634). The phrase 'продукция лёгкой промышленности' / 'лёгкой промышленности' does NOT appear literally in Табл.4 (confirmed absent in both passes). 631184 'Материалы нетканые' falls inside the 631-634 range, so 0.75 applies by range membership.
631184_legkaya_prom.matchesLiveSeed: tr1-k3-full.json class3 row {631-634 'Ткани, швейные изделия' 0.75} matches. Reference chain C3-c/C3-d applied legkayaProm_0.75 and the math reproduces the oracle.
631184_legkaya_prom.yellowReason: Verbatim coefficient 0,75 confirmed in pass 1 but the cell read blank in pass 2 (column-alignment artifact of the page summarizer). Independent web corroboration not obtained. The VALUE is corroborated three ways (pass-1 verbatim + matches live seed + reproduces the R-Тариф oracle), so it is operationally safe, but a clean single-source verbatim re-read is recommended.
631184_legkaya_prom.sourceToConfirm: Табл.4 Раздел III row '631 - 634' rightmost coefficient column — read literally to confirm 0,75 vs 0,750.

481232_kisloty.cargoName: Кислоты, оксиды, пероксиды и ангидриды (reference 481232 Кислота серная)
481232_kisloty.verbatim: «Кислоты, оксиды, пероксиды и ангидриды | 481 | 0,81» (Раздел III, класс 3)
481232_kisloty.matchesLiveSeed: tr1-k3-full.json class3 row {481 'Кислоты, оксиды' 0.81} matches exactly. Reference cistern chain CIS-C3 applied kisloty_0.81.

685127_maty.k3_verified: ABSENT — no Табл.4 commodity coefficient for position 685 / маты
685127_maty.verdict: CORRECTION — the reference label is MISLEADING
685127_maty.finding: Position 685 / 'Маты' / 'растительн' has NO row in Табл.4 in either fetch pass. Therefore there is NO товарный (K3) commodity coefficient for маты 685127.
685127_maty.criticalCorrection: The reference _meta field commodityCoef_examples.'маты_раст_685127': 1.04 is a MISLABEL. The 1.04 in the реальной chain is NOT a commodity coefficient — it is the п.5.7 class-3 surcharge (Коэффициент на перевозку грузов 3 класса ×1.04), the SAME 1.04 applied to every class-3 cargo. Inspect reference C3-a/C3-b chains: they go schema8_base → k4 → ownPv_0.9774 → k1_class3_1.54 → class3_1.04 → dopIndex_1.01, with NO separate commodity-coef step. So маты has NO K3 товарный коэф; its only ×1.04 is the universal class-3 surcharge. This matches the engine model (no commodity coef for 685127).
685127_maty.matchesLiveSeed: tr1-k3-full.json has NO row for 685 — consistent. Engine should NOT apply any commodity K3 to 685127; only the п.5.7 ×1.04 class-3 surcharge.
685127_maty.greenReason: ABSENCE is robustly confirmed: position 685 appears in neither pass of Табл.4, and the oracle chain reproduces the value with NO commodity step. The correction (relabel the '1.04 commodity coef' as the п.5.7 class-3 surcharge) is structurally certain.

371070_svai.k3_reference: none (reference note: 'сваи металлические: коэф груза НЕТ')
371070_svai.k3_verified: ABSENT — confirmed no Табл.4 commodity coefficient for position 371 / сваи
371070_svai.finding: Position 371 / 'Сваи' / 'Конструкции и детали верхнего строения пути' has NO row in Табл.4 in either pass. Reference correctly states 'коэф груза НЕТ'. Reference platform chains PL-C3-a/PL-C3-b apply NO commodity coef (NO_commodity_coef:true), only k1_class3_1.54 and the class3_1.04 surcharge.
371070_svai.matchesLiveSeed: tr1-k3-full.json has NO row for 371 — consistent. Engine applies no commodity K3 to 371070; only K1 class-3 1.54 + п.5.7 ×1.04.

232431_nerud.verbatim_k3: «Материалы минерально-строительные природные. Зола. Шлаки, кроме гранулированных и металлургических для переплавки | 231 - 236 | 0,77» (Раздел I, класс 1)
232431_nerud.verbatim_p1_5: «...в универсальных полувагонах и платформах ... дополнительно применяется коэффициент 0,909»
232431_nerud.matchesLiveSeed: tr1-k3-full.json class1[0] = 0.77; class1_extra п.1.5 = 0.909. Both confirmed. Product 0.69993 is oracle-locked (reproduces N8/prod/Rtariff receipts). Reference inventory chains INV-1/INV-6_20 apply nerud_0.77 then minerals_0.909.

k1_class3_split_174_vs_154.scope: Confirm the class-3 K1 1.74-vs-1.54 split and which reference cargoes land in which bucket (Табл.2).
k1_class3_split_174_vs_154.verdict: CONFIRMED — byte-identical to tr1-class-coeff.json and tr1-class-coeff-corrected.json

481232_kislota_sernaya.note: 481 IS explicitly in the 1.74 list → cistern oracle CIS-C3 correctly uses k1_class3_1.74. CONFIRMED.

631184_netkanye.note: 631 NOT in 1.74 list (611 IS, but 631 is not) → 1.54. Matches reference C3-c/C3-d k1_class3_1.54.

371070_svai.note: 371 NOT in 1.74 list → 1.54. Matches reference PL-C3-a/PL-C3-b k1_class3_1.54.

685127_maty.note: 685 NOT in 1.74 list → 1.54. Matches reference C3-a/C3-b k1_class3_1.54.

254040_jb.note: 254 is class 2 → K1=1.00 flat, not class-3 split. Matches reference C2-a/C2-b k1_class2_1.00.

k1_class3_split_174_vs_154.criticalNote: The 1.74 split is POSITION-dependent (3-digit ЕТСНГ group), not commodity-category-dependent. Кислота серная 481232 → leading position 481 → in the named list → 1.74. The reference _meta note 'кислота serous is 1.74' is CONFIRMED. All other class-3 reference cargoes (631/371/685) correctly fall to 1.54.
k1_class3_split_174_vs_154.matchesLiveSeed: tr1-class-coeff.json (line 158) and tr1-class-coeff-corrected.json (line 148) carry the 1.74 list byte-identically; verified this pass against Табл.2 verbatim — no position added/dropped/shifted.

class2_class3_surcharge_104.scope: Verify the ×1.04 surcharge applied to class-2 (п.3.3) and class-3 (п.5.7) cargoes in полувагон/платформа.

p3_3_class2.verbatim: «...дополнительно применяется коэффициент 1,04» (раздел для грузов второго тарифного класса в полувагонах/платформах)
p3_3_class2.appliesTo: Отдельные грузы класса 2 в универсальных полувагонах/платформах (п.3.3 Табл.4)
p3_3_class2.matchesLiveSeed: tr1-k3-full.json class2_extra п.3.3 = 1.04. Reference C2-a/C2-b and PL-C2-a/PL-C2-b apply class2_1.04.

p5_7_class3.verbatim: «...дополнительно применяется коэффициент 1,04» (раздел для грузов третьего тарифного класса в полувагонах/платформах)
p5_7_class3.appliesTo: Отдельные грузы класса 3 в универсальных полувагонах/платформах (п.5.7 Табл.4)
p5_7_class3.matchesLiveSeed: tr1-k3-full.json class3_extra п.5.7 = 1.04. Reference C3-a..d, PL-C3-a/b, CIS-C3 apply class3_1.04. This is the SAME 1.04 that the reference _meta mislabeled as the 'маты commodity coef' — see 685127_maty.criticalCorrection.

class2_class3_surcharge_104.scopeCaveat: VALUE 1.04 confirmed for both п.3.3 and п.5.7 in both passes. The EXACT applicability wording (which specific cargo subsets / wagon types each п. enumerates) was NOT re-fetched cell-by-cell this pass; live seed appliesTo strings are paraphrases. Flagged yellow ONLY for the applicability-scope text, not the 1.04 value.
class2_class3_surcharge_104.scopeSourceToConfirm: Табл.4 п.3.3 and п.5.7 full enumerating text — read literally to confirm the exact cargo/wagon scope each surcharge covers.

corrections.problem: Labeled as a commodity (K3) coefficient. Табл.4 has NO row for position 685, so маты has NO товарный коэф.
corrections.correction: The 1.04 is the п.5.7 class-3 surcharge (applied to ALL class-3 cargoes), NOT a commodity coef. The oracle chain C3-a confirms: no separate commodity step exists for маты.
corrections.engineImpact: NONE if engine already applies only the п.5.7 ×1.04 to 685127 and no commodity K3 (which the chain implies). Verify the engine does not look up a phantom 1.04 commodity coef for 685127.
corrections.doNotEditLiveSeed: tr1-k3-full.json is already correct (no 685 row). No live-seed edit needed; this is a label clarification of the REFERENCE meta only — and per instructions live seeds are NOT edited here.

corrections.correction: Numerically identical (both 0.91). Cosmetic only; no functional defect.

summary.oracleRegression: No green oracle touched. All findings are consistent with the inventory_cases / own_pv_class23_cases / platform_cases / cistern_cases breakdowns and with the certified golden oracles.
